Hi this is Tucker (tedvr) on YouTube I’ve been looking for a game like this and I make gtag content on YouTube and I love the design of this game it’s realy cool and I am a really nice person and I’ll make sure that any toxic people in this game will get banned if you give me it. I’ve seen a lot of videos on this game from viper and it looks really fun.  I’ll post about this game and make sure that everyone that watches my videos that have vrs will get it. So pls give me moderator so if anyone sees this can you dm the creator of the game and sho him this pls and thank you.

This game is one of the best game in the store and i play from the first christmas tag but sadly my vr broke so i got a new one but i was trying to become mod in the game and I’m very nice and ill try to make videos about the game and if i get mod its gonna help out alot so i hope someone from the team finds this and shows it to the owner and thank you for making this game
